summary: A pure read model that tells a worker whether the system is ready to source, enrich, skip-trace, DNC-check, and operate -- server/db/backup/postgres/source health, credential PRESENCE (never values), skiptrace + DNC posture, and recent job failures.

files.role: buildOpsReadiness(input): PURE read-model builder. Also exports CREDENTIAL_KEYS. Credentials are presence-only (never values).

Read-only script surface: gathers real facts (db read-only, settings/env presence, backups dir, optional Postgres source-health) and prints JSON. No server boot, no backups written. Run: node tools/ops_readiness_report.mjs [--compact].
createSourceHealth().health() supplies source freshness/up-down summarized into ops.sources.
Per-record skip-trace gate; ops.skiptrace.spend_still_gated:true means key presence != authorization.
Deny-by-default contact gate behind ops.dnc (outreach stays false until DNC/consent verified).

routes.summary: Source health feed that ops.sources summarizes (related read surface; ops itself is exposed via script, not a route -- CALLNOW owns server.js).
Backup status that ops.backup overlaps (related read surface).

tests.role: 13 unit tests for buildOpsReadiness, incl. an assertion that a planted secret can never serialize into the model.

tables.name: source_runs
tables.role: Source run history summarized into ops.sources and recent_job_failures.

tables.name: settings
tables.role: Credential presence (gmail_user/gmail_app_password and other keys) read as present/source -- never the value.

docs.role: Operator pre-flight checklist + field-name reference (built by OPS).

audit_findings.finding: Industrial ops visibility graded low-medium: source-health and backup concepts exist but there is no complete operations projection for server, relay, storage, credentials, jobs, and provider readiness. Ops view should show skiptrace/DNC/source/backup readiness.
Industrial execution audit motivating the ops-readiness read model.
Gap register entry for operations readiness visibility.

next_actions.action: Optionally add a read-only server route that imports buildOpsReadiness and feeds it the same facts the script gathers.
next_actions.note: Per OPS DONE_OPS.md: a future server route can `import { buildOpsReadiness } from "./ops_readiness.js"`; CALLNOW (or a later owner of server.js) would own that edit. backup.last is server-only in-process state so the script reports it null; a route would have it.

next_actions.action: Keep contact posture as per-contact deny-until-checked -- there is intentionally NO system-wide ready_to_contact field.
next_actions.note: Confirmed by OPS (MSG_20260630T1352Z): ops.overall has ready_to_operate/ready_to_source/ready_to_skiptrace + contact_posture='deny_until_checked', not ready_to_contact.
